---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve genie
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `genie ...`
2. Provide config `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and stack traces.

## Environment

- **genie version**: (`genie --version`)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **Go version** (if building from source): (`go version`)
- **Config format**: TOML / YAML

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or log output here.
